title: tragopogon ruber
intro: Tragopogon ruber, also known as sanguisorba rubra or red sanguisorba, is a plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae) native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, ulcers, and inflammation due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tragopogon ruber include its ability to reduce bleeding, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. Tragopogon ruber is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its root is also used in traditional herbal medicine.
